responses: Hello! Welcome to our customer support. How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you today?
Hey! I'm here to help with your queries. What do you need?
Goodbye! Have a great day.
Thanks for reaching out. See you next time!
Take care! Feel free to come back if you need anything.
You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help with?
Happy to help! Let me know if you need anything else.
Anytime! Glad I could assist.

patterns: i want to track my package
responses: You can track your order status by entering your order ID on the 'Track Order' page. Would you like the link?
Please share your order ID and I'll help check its current status.
Orders are usually delivered within 3-5 business days. You can also track it live from the Order Tracking page.

patterns: how do i cancel an order
i want to cancel my order
i changed my mind cancel it
responses: You can cancel your order within 24 hours of placing it from the 'My Orders' section. Would you like me to guide you?
To cancel an order, go to My Orders > Select Order > Cancel Order. Note: orders already shipped cannot be cancelled.

patterns: when will i get my refund
responses: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the returned item is received and inspected.
You can request a refund from the 'My Orders' page by selecting 'Request Refund'. It typically takes 5-7 business days.
If your refund is delayed beyond 7 business days, please share your order ID so I can escalate it.

patterns: i want to return a product
responses: You can return most items within 7 days of delivery, provided they are unused and in original packaging.
To start a return, go to 'My Orders', select the item, and click 'Return or Exchange'.

patterns: when will i receive my order
responses: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days and is free on orders above the minimum threshold.
We offer standard (3-5 days) and express (1-2 days) shipping. Charges depend on your location and order value.
Currently we ship domestically. International shipping support is coming soon!

patterns: my payment did not go through
money deducted but order not placed
responses: We accept credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and popular wallets. If money was deducted but order failed, it will be auto-refunded within 5-7 business days.
Sorry about that! If you were charged twice, please share your transaction ID so we can investigate immediately.
Payment failures are usually resolved automatically. If the issue persists, try another payment method or contact your bank.

patterns: when will it be back in stock
responses: You can check real-time stock availability on the product page. Would you like me to look up a specific item?
If an item is out of stock, you can click 'Notify Me' to get an alert as soon as it's restocked.
You can check our current offers on the 'Deals' page. New users also get a welcome discount on their first order!
We regularly run seasonal sales. Subscribe to our newsletter to get exclusive coupon codes.

patterns: i want to file a complaint
i am not happy with my order
responses: I'm really sorry for the inconvenience. Please share your order ID so I can raise a complaint ticket immediately.
That's not the experience we want for you. Let's get this fixed — could you share your order ID and describe the issue?

patterns: i want to speak to support staff
responses: Sure, I'm connecting you to a live support agent. Please hold on.
I'll escalate this to our human support team right away. You can also reach us at support@example.com.
I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Could you rephrase your question?
I'm not sure I follow. Could you provide a bit more detail, or ask about orders, refunds, shipping, or payments?
Hmm, I don't have an answer for that yet. Would you like me to connect you to a human agent?
